name: CblTalnIdsMrLnSvcCatTermDtUpdate

text.value: WITH cteTransform AS (SELECT @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AS TERM_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCdSk} AS SRC_SYS_CD_SK) UPDATE T SET T.TERM_DT_SK = cteTransform.TERM_DT_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = cteTransform.RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MR_LN_SVC_CAT T CROSS JOIN cteTransform WHERE T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK < cteTransform.RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AND T.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = cteTransform.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND T.MR_LN_SVC_CAT_SK NOT IN (0,1) AND T.TERM_DT_SK = '2199-12-31'
